conversion_effect.name: conversion_effect
conversion_effect.description: Changes the user's type to match the target's type.

haze_effect.name: haze_effect
haze_effect.description: Resets all stat modifiers and removes status conditions like Leech Seed, Mist, etc.

switch_and_teleport_effect.name: switch_and_teleport_effect
switch_and_teleport_effect.description: Forces the target to switch out, or the user flees the battle.

mist_effect.name: mist_effect
mist_effect.description: Protects the user's stats from being lowered by enemy moves.

focus_energy_effect.name: focus_energy_effect
focus_energy_effect.description: Intended to increase critical hit ratio (due to a bug in Gen 1, it actually quarters it).

confusion_effect.name: confusion_effect
confusion_effect.description: Confuses the target, giving it a 50% chance to hurt itself.

heal_effect.name: heal_effect
heal_effect.description: Recovers up to half of the user's maximum HP.

transform_effect.name: transform_effect
transform_effect.description: Morphs the user into an exact copy of the target (stats, moves, appearance).

light_screen_effect.name: light_screen_effect
light_screen_effect.description: Doubles the user's Special stat when taking damage.

reflect_effect.name: reflect_effect
reflect_effect.description: Doubles the user's Defense stat when taking damage.

poison_effect.name: poison_effect
poison_effect.description: Poisons the target, dealing 1/16 of its max HP in damage per turn.

paralyze_effect.name: paralyze_effect
paralyze_effect.description: Paralyzes the target, reducing its Speed by 75% and adding a 25% chance to miss its turn.

substitute_effect.name: substitute_effect
substitute_effect.description: Uses 1/4 of max HP to create a clone that absorbs damage and blocks status effects.

mimic_effect.name: mimic_effect
mimic_effect.description: Copies one of the target's moves for the remainder of the battle.

leech_seed_effect.name: leech_seed_effect
leech_seed_effect.description: Plants a seed on the target that drains 1/16 of its max HP each turn to heal the user.

sleep_effect.name: sleep_effect
sleep_effect.description: Puts the target to sleep for 1 to 7 turns.

bide_effect.name: bide_effect
bide_effect.description: User waits for 2-3 turns, storing damage taken, and returns double the damage.

effect_01.name: effect_01
effect_01.description: Unused or generic stat modifier effect placeholder.

stat_up1_effect.name: stat_up1_effect
stat_up1_effect.description: Increases a specific stat (Attack, Defense, Speed, Special, Accuracy, Evasion) by 1 stage.

stat_down1_effect.name: stat_down1_effect
stat_down1_effect.description: Decreases a specific stat (Attack, Defense, Speed, etc.) by 1 stage.

stat_up2_effect.name: stat_up2_effect
stat_up2_effect.description: Increases a specific stat (Attack, Defense, Speed, etc.) sharply by 2 stages.

stat_down2_effect.name: stat_down2_effect
stat_down2_effect.description: Decreases a specific stat (Attack, Defense, Speed, etc.) sharply by 2 stages.

super_fang_effect.name: super_fang_effect
super_fang_effect.description: Always halves the target's current HP.

special_damage_effect.name: special_damage_effect
special_damage_effect.description: Deals fixed damage (e.g., SonicBoom) or level-based damage (e.g., Seismic Toss).

drain_hp_effect.name: drain_hp_effect
drain_hp_effect.description: Heals the user by 50% of the damage dealt to the target.

explode_effect.name: explode_effect
explode_effect.description: User faints. Halves the target's Defense before damage calculation.

dream_eater_effect.name: dream_eater_effect
dream_eater_effect.description: Fails unless the target is asleep. Drains 50% of damage dealt.

pay_day_effect.name: pay_day_effect
pay_day_effect.description: Scatters coins on the ground to be picked up after the battle.

two_to_five_attacks_effect.name: two_to_five_attacks_effect
two_to_five_attacks_effect.description: Hits the target 2 to 5 times in a row.

effect_1e.name: effect_1e
effect_1e.description: Special multi-hit behavior, used for Double Kick and Twineedle.

recoil_effect.name: recoil_effect
recoil_effect.description: User takes 1/4 of the damage dealt as recoil damage.

twineedle_effect.name: twineedle_effect
twineedle_effect.description: Hits twice. Has a 20% chance to poison the target.

rage_effect.name: rage_effect
rage_effect.description: Locks the user into the move. Attack stat increases by 1 stage every time the user is hit.

swift_effect.name: swift_effect
swift_effect.description: Bypasses accuracy and evasion checks. Never misses.

charge_effect.name: charge_effect
charge_effect.description: User charges energy on the first turn and attacks on the second.

fly_effect.name: fly_effect
fly_effect.description: User becomes invulnerable on the first turn and attacks on the second.

jump_kick_effect.name: jump_kick_effect
jump_kick_effect.description: If the move misses, the user takes 1 HP crash damage (Gen 1 bug, intended to be 1/8 of damage).

thrash_petal_dance_effect.name: thrash_petal_dance_effect
thrash_petal_dance_effect.description: Locks the user into the move for 3-4 turns, then confuses the user.

trapping_effect.name: trapping_effect
trapping_effect.description: Traps the target, dealing damage over 2-5 turns and preventing them from attacking.

mirror_move_effect.name: mirror_move_effect
mirror_move_effect.description: Uses the last move targeted at the user by the opponent.

metronome_effect.name: metronome_effect
metronome_effect.description: Selects and uses a random move from the game.
